# Antek Automation

> AI automation agency based in Andover, Hampshire providing AI voice agents, website chatbots, n8n workflow automation, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimisation) for UK businesses.

## Services

- [AI Voice Agents](https://www.antekautomation.com/services/ai-voice-assistants): Custom AI voice agents that work inbound and outbound — answer calls in a natural voice, and call new leads back in seconds, qualify them, confirm appointments and chase follow-ups. 24/7. From £97/month + £249 setup. Certified Retell AI partner.
- [AI Chatbots](https://www.antekautomation.com/services/ai-chatbots): Custom-trained website chatbots that answer questions, capture leads, book appointments, and qualify prospects. Handles ~80% of conversations autonomously. From £57/month + £149 setup.
- [Workflow Automation](https://www.antekautomation.com/services/workflow-automation): Business process automation built on n8n (open source) connecting 400+ tools including Google Workspace, Xero, Stripe, HubSpot, Slack, and WhatsApp. One-off projects from £250. Saves 10-20 hours/week.
- [GEO Audit](https://www.antekautomation.com/services/geo-audit): Generative Engine Optimisation — get your business cited in AI search answers (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Gemini). Audit, fix and stay visible. From £247.
- [AI Receptionist](https://www.antekautomation.com/ai-receptionist): Productised inbound call-answering service for UK SMBs — screens callers, captures details, and books appointments 24/7. From £97/month + £249 setup. Industry pages for electricians, plumbers, HVAC engineers, accountants, lawyers, veterinary practices, dentists, and therapists.

## About

- [About](https://www.antekautomation.com/about): About Antek Automation and founder Andy Norman. 30+ years in technology, Certified Retell AI Partner, FSB member. Based in Andover, Hampshire.
- [Homepage](https://www.antekautomation.com): AI automation agency overview — four services (voice, chat, automation, GEO) with illustrative case studies.
- [Pricing](https://www.antekautomation.com/pricing): Transparent pricing for AI Voice & Receptionist, AI Chatbot, Workflow Automation and GEO Audit, with a side-by-side comparison table.
- [Contact](https://www.antekautomation.com/contact): Contact form, Cal.com booking, phone (0333 038 9960), email (hello@antekautomation.com), office location in Andover, Hampshire.

## Locations

- [All Locations](https://www.antekautomation.com/locations): The Antek location network across Hampshire, Berkshire and the South Coast.
- [Hampshire](https://www.antekautomation.com/locations/hampshire): County hub serving Andover, Basingstoke, Winchester, Southampton and Portsmouth.
- [Andover](https://www.antekautomation.com/locations/andover): Local AI automation services from Antek Automation's Andover headquarters.
- [Basingstoke](https://www.antekautomation.com/locations/basingstoke): AI automation for Basingstoke businesses.
- [Winchester](https://www.antekautomation.com/locations/winchester): AI automation for Winchester's professional firms and trades.
- [Southampton](https://www.antekautomation.com/locations/southampton): AI automation for Southampton businesses.
- [Portsmouth](https://www.antekautomation.com/locations/portsmouth): AI automation for Portsmouth and the Solent area.
- [Berkshire](https://www.antekautomation.com/locations/berkshire): County hub for the Thames Valley, serving Reading and Newbury.
- [Reading](https://www.antekautomation.com/locations/reading): AI automation for Reading and the Thames Valley.
- [Newbury](https://www.antekautomation.com/locations/newbury): AI automation for Newbury and West Berkshire.
- [Salisbury](https://www.antekautomation.com/locations/salisbury): AI automation for Salisbury, Wiltshire.
- [Bournemouth](https://www.antekautomation.com/locations/bournemouth): AI automation for Bournemouth, Christchurch and Poole.

## Key Facts

- Headquarters: Chantry House, 38 Chantry Way, Andover, Hampshire, SP10 1LZ
- Phone: 0333 038 9960
- Founder: Andy Norman (30+ years in technology)
- Certified Retell AI Partner, FSB member
- Pricing: AI Voice Agents & AI Receptionist from £97/month + £249 setup · AI Chatbots from £57/month + £149 setup · Workflow Automation from £250 (one-off) · GEO Audit from £247
- Industries served: Hospitality, dental, legal, accounting, trades, cleaning, estate agents, restaurants, salons, fitness, property management, veterinary
